stationarity.classification_basis: Conflict: chi2 criterion → 'stationary' (pct=0.710), circ_std criterion → 'non-stationary' (circ_std_deg=84.43°). Applied more conservative classification: 'non-stationary'.
Both criteria agree (non-stationary): pct_chi2_sig=0.194 < 0.30 or circ_std_deg=103.85° > 40°.
Conflict: chi2 criterion → 'partially stationary' (pct=0.403), circ_std criterion → 'non-stationary' (circ_std_deg=86.79°). Applied more conservative classification: 'non-stationary'.
Both criteria agree (non-stationary): pct_chi2_sig=0.065 < 0.30 or circ_std_deg=89.82° > 40°.
